untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of a specific support level L1 and mean reversion target F that are not explicitly defined in the source text. The signal also relies on trader conviction/discretion rather than quantifiable price or indicator thresholds. Critical parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period) are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be operationalized. Support/resistance detection and mean reversion targets cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators without arbitrary assumptions.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Entry when price drops below sma_20 (mean-reversion signal), exit when price reverts above sma_50 (higher price level). However, this is speculative as the original signal lacks concrete definitions of L1, F, and the mechanism for identifying support levels. The all-in position sizing instruction (deploy all capital in single transaction) cannot be expressed in this JSON rule schema and must be configured separately in the backtest engine.
